tools.name: show_sf_info
tools.description: Display detailed information about SubscriptionFlow's subscription management platform. Returns content for the specified topic including features, supported industries, integrations, benefits, or pricing. Use topic 'all' to show everything at once.

tools.name: show_contact_form
tools.description: Display an interactive contact form that lets users send a message to the SubscriptionFlow sales team. The form collects name, email, company, an optional phone number, and a message.

tools.name: submit_contact_form
tools.description: Process a contact form submission by sending an email notification to the SubscriptionFlow sales team. Requires name, email, company, and message fields. Phone is optional. Returns a reference ID for tracking.

tools.name: show_demo_booking
tools.description: Show an interactive form to schedule a product demo with the SubscriptionFlow team. Collects the user's name, email, and company, then opens a Calendly scheduling link pre-filled with their details.
